goal: Make Mojo the explicit performance-kernel layer while targeting Python 3.14 for orchestration and packaging once CI can install it.
notes: Stable orchestration remains typed Python, but performance-critical tokenisation, fuzzy matching and vector prefilters are tracked as Mojo kernels.
title: Mojo-first runtime and Python 3.14 compatibility

goal: Download or API-fetch public sources using curl/wget/API clients, snapshot them locally, and publish derived-only validated records.
notes: Raw source files remain ignored and local-only unless licence review explicitly permits redistribution.
title: Evidence-grade live source ingestion

goal: Treat each policy question as a protocolled research output with OSF components, reports, appendices and preprint pathways.
notes: OSF is the protocol/report archive; GitHub is the implementation repo; Hugging Face is the derived data/dashboard distribution path.
title: OSF research protocol and report workflow

goal: Package licence-safe derived data for Hugging Face Datasets and deploy the static dashboard to Hugging Face Spaces.
notes: Publication is blocked until licence gates, source redaction and release readiness pass.
title: Hugging Face dataset and Spaces publication

goal: Emit Frictionless Data Package, RO-Crate, DCAT and citation metadata for release candidates.
notes: These outputs support reproducibility, discovery and archival release.
title: Research-data packaging standards

goal: Move from deterministic candidate crosswalks to adjudicated mapping evidence with gold standards, negative controls and reviewer state.
notes: No high-impact policy output should rely on unreviewed automatic crosswalks.
title: Human-in-the-loop mapping workbench

goal: Make release gates enforceable through GitHub Actions, action SHA pinning, SBOMs, attestations, Scorecard, CodeQL, dependency review and zizmór.
notes: Current sandbox cannot resolve all network gates, so the repo records blocked states explicitly.
title: CI/CD and supply-chain hardening

goal: Produce publishable demonstrations for genomics/pathology, cognitive-procedural relativities, medicine price opacity and coverage discretion.
notes: Demonstrators should prioritise policy architecture and uncertainty over simplistic price league tables.
title: First policy demonstrators

goal: Make downloaded source validation, table-level data-quality checks and research-question linkages explicit release gates before policy outputs are trusted.
notes: This track closes the gap between acquisition plumbing and evidence-grade policy outputs; v17 adds evidence-readiness, data dictionary and source/schema drift gates.
title: Data quality, source validation and evidence readiness

goal: Present the atlas as a current, citable and accessible public product with a deployed dashboard, trustworthy status reporting and release-grade scholarly metadata.
notes: Public presentation must distinguish software readiness from research, evidence and publication readiness; dashboard deployment must expose only dashboard-safe derived artefacts.
title: Public product, citation and dashboard maturity

goal: Archive all discoverable historical source payloads locally, bind each to provenance/licence/citation metadata, and describe transformations in BPMN 2.0 without publishing unreviewed raw data.
notes: Local download does not grant redistribution rights; source-specific licence, methods and evidence review remain required.
title: Historical source archival and academic reproducibility

goal: Complete the OSF Preregistration metadata and protocol freeze to produce a citable, reproducible and reviewable research record without publishing papers.
notes: Registration review and submission are separately gated; paper and preprint publication remain out of scope.
title: OSF registration record quality and protocol freeze

goal: Close the mapping, source-licence, dashboard and research-methods review gates with explicit accountable-review evidence while preserving fail-closed evidence claims.
notes: Accountable human review remains required for evidence claims and licence decisions.
title: Evidence adjudication and accountable-review closure

goal: Make every historical and live source release citable and reproducible through source-specific licence decisions, transformation lineage, checksums and release-safe derived outputs.
notes: Raw and licence-gated source payloads remain local-only unless separately reviewed and permitted.
title: Source provenance, licensing and historical release reproducibility

goal: Bring the repository, OSF record, dashboard and release archive to a coherent citable state without claiming evidence readiness or publishing papers prematurely.
notes: Final publication review is required before any paper or preprint submission.
title: Citation, archive and public record maturity
